'''gowanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubous|jubous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubous|jubous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gowanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowanithi|gowanithi]] || [[word:gowaniji|gowaniji]] || [[word:gowanishi|gowanishi]] || [[word:gowaniki|gowaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowanuthuthu|gowanuthuthu]] || [[word:gowanujuju|gowanujuju]] || [[word:gowanushushu|gowanushushu]] || [[word:gowanukuku|gowanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowanuthu|gowanuthu]] || [[word:gowanuju|gowanuju]] || [[word:gowanushu|gowanushu]] || [[word:gowanuku|gowanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowanufthuf|gowanufthuf]] || [[word:gowanufjuf|gowanufjuf]] || [[word:gowanufshuf|gowanufshuf]] || [[word:gowanufkuf|gowanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowanethe|gowanethe]] || [[word:gowaneje|gowaneje]] || [[word:gowaneshe|gowaneshe]] || [[word:gowaneke|gowaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowanothotho|gowanothotho]] || [[word:gowanojojo|gowanojojo]] || [[word:gowanoshosho|gowanoshosho]] || [[word:gowanokoko|gowanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowanotho|gowanotho]] || [[word:gowanojo|gowanojo]] || [[word:gowanosho|gowanosho]] || [[word:gowanoko|gowanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowanofthof|gowanofthof]] || [[word:gowanofjof|gowanofjof]] || [[word:gowanofshof|gowanofshof]] || [[word:gowanofkof|gowanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfthÃŸf|gowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfjÃŸf|gowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfshÃŸf|gowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfkÃŸf|gowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gowanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gowanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gowanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gowanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfthÃŸf|gowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfjÃŸf|gowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfshÃŸf|gowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfkÃŸf|gowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfthÃŸf|gowanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfjÃŸf|gowanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfshÃŸf|gowanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gowanÃŸfkÃŸf|gowanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowanÃḊthÃḊ|gowanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gowanÃḊjÃḊ|gowanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gowanÃḊshÃḊ|gowanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gowanÃḊkÃḊ|gowanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowanathatha|gowanathatha]] || [[word:gowanajaja|gowanajaja]] || [[word:gowanashasha|gowanashasha]] || [[word:gowanakaka|gowanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowanatha|gowanatha]] || [[word:gowanaja|gowanaja]] || [[word:gowanasha|gowanasha]] || [[word:gowanaka|gowanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowanafthaf|gowanafthaf]] || [[word:gowanafjaf|gowanafjaf]] || [[word:gowanafshaf|gowanafshaf]] || [[word:gowanafkaf|gowanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gowanasha|gowanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowanshÃḋsha|gowanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowanrosha|gowanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowanmusha|gowanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowanyasha|gowanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowankshÃḋsha|gogowankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowankrosha|gogowankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowankmusha|gogowankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowankyasha|gogowankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gowawanasha|gowawanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowawanshÃḋsha|gowawanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowawanrosha|gowawanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowawanmusha|gowawanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowawanyasha|gowawanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowawankshÃḋsha|gogowawankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowawankrosha|gogowawankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowawankmusha|gogowawankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowawankyasha|gogowawankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gewÃḊnasha|gewÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gewÃḊnshÃḋsha|gewÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gewÃḊnrosha|gewÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gewÃḊnmusha|gewÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gewÃḊnyasha|gewÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogewÃḊnkshÃḋsha|gogewÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogewÃḊnkrosha|gogewÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogewÃḊnkmusha|gogewÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogewÃḊnkyasha|gogewÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gowfanasha|gowfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowfanshÃḋsha|gowfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowfanrosha|gowfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowfanmusha|gowfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowfanyasha|gowfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowfankshÃḋsha|gogowfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowfankrosha|gogowfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowfankmusha|gogowfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowfankyasha|gogowfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
